# mmp-ai Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-10

## Active Technologies

- Python 3.11 + `asyncssh` (SFTP), `boto3` (S3), `motor` (MongoDB async driver), `tenacity` (retry), `pydantic-settings` + `PyYAML` (config), `structlog` (JSON logging), `opentelemetry-sdk`, `prometheus-client` (001-network-drive-s3-ingest)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

cd src; pytest; ruff check .

## Code Style

Python 3.11: Follow standard conventions
